title: Chain armor recipe mod
description: Adds chain armor recipe to minecraft, also backports iron nugget, iron nugget is used for chain armor crafting
body:
Adds chain armor recipe to minecraft, also backports iron nugget, iron nugget is used for chain armor crafting

Thats all :p

Crafting is same as other armors.

NOTE: This mod is for forge only

Supported versions:
 - 1.7.10
